refined_question: What methods can stabilize deep neural network training without modifying the architecture, addressing unstable gradients and loss oscillation in early epochs?
intent: Understand techniques to mitigate unstable gradients and loss divergence in deep neural network training, within the domain of machine learning, specifically focusing on stabilization methods that do not involve redesigning the network architecture
excluded_topics: scaling parameter count as primary solution
search_hint: deep neural network, unstable gradients, loss oscillation, stabilization techniques, gradient clipping, learning rate scheduling, batch normalization, weight regularization, early stopping, gradient penalty
